summary:
Radiotherapy for Hodgkin lymphoma is linked to an increased risk of secondary lung cancer, consistently identified across medical literature as one of the most common radiation-associated malignancies. This risk is supported by numerous authoritative sources noting elevated incidences or specific associations between thoracic irradiation fields and subsequent development of pulmonary tumors. 

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{A}}$  
(Note: Agent1 correctly identifies the heightened risk based on well-established clinical data.)
